	historical = yes
	dna = dna_prince_karl_theodor
	culture = cu:south_german
	female = no
	ideology = ideology_royalist
	commander_rank = default
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	birth_date = 1795.7.7
	traits = {
	}
	commander_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			exists = c:BAV
			c:BAV ?= THIS
			c:BAV ?= { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
		}
		role = general
		earliest_usage_date = 1836.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1866.1.1
		chance = 50
	}
}

REPLACE:pru_general_prince_friedrich_karl = {
	first_name = Prince_Friedrich_Karl
	last_name = von_Hohenzollern
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:north_german
	female = no
	ideology = ideology_royalist
	commander_rank = default
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	birth_date = 1828.3.20
	traits = {
		experienced_offensive_planner
		innovative
		surveyor
	}
	commander_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					exists = c:PRU
					c:PRU ?= THIS
					c:PRU ?= { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
				}
				AND = {
					NOT = { exists = c:PRU }
					exists = c:GER
					c:GER ?= THIS
					c:GER ?= { owns_entire_state_region = STATE_POMERANIA }
					c:GER ?= { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
				}
			}
		}
		role = general
		earliest_usage_date = 1851.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1890.1.1
		chance = 50
	}
}
